spdfcdasdatarequest__define.pro


This class is an IDL representation of the DataRequest element from the Coordinated Data Analysis System (CDAS) XML schema.

Author information

Author

B. Harris

Copyright

Class description for SpdfCdasDataRequest

Routines

Routines from spdfcdasdatarequest__define.pro

result = SpdfCdasDataRequest::init(dataRequestEntity)

Creates an SpdfCdasDataRequest object.

SpdfCdasDataRequest::cleanup

Performs cleanup operations when this object is destroyed.

result = SpdfCdasDataRequest::getDataRequestEntity()

Gets the data-request entity.

result = SpdfCdasDataRequest::createDomElement(doc)

Creates a DataRequest element using the given XML DOM document with the values of this object.

SpdfCdasDataRequest__define

Defines the SpdfCdasDataRequest class.

result = SpdfCdasDataRequest::init(dataRequestEntity)

Creates an SpdfCdasDataRequest object.

reference to an SpdfCdasDataRequest object.

dataRequestEntity in type=SpdfCdasDataRequestEntity

a data request.

top source SpdfCdasDataRequest::createDomElement

result = SpdfCdasDataRequest::createDomElement(doc)

Creates a DataRequest element using the given XML DOM document with the values of this object.

Return value

a reference to a new IDLffXMLDOMElement representation of this object.

Parameters

doc in type=IDLffXMLDOMDocument

document in which to create the DataRequest element.
